---
title: "Predictive Model: Identifying Haustoriated Genes"
author: "Iliana Castillo-Machuca | Virginia Tech SPES"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    df_print: paged
    number_sections: true
---

```{r CLEAR-env}
  #----------------- CLEAN ENVIRONMENT -----------------# 
rm(list = ls(all.names = TRUE)) # Remove all objects from the workspace
gc()  # Garbage collection to free memory

options(
  max.print = 1e5,  #cap to avoid massive console dumps
  scipen = 999, # Use scientific notation 0, use full numbers 999
  big.mark = ",", #trying to see if i can add commas
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, # Keep strings as character by default
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE, # Suppress dplyr's summaries
  digits = 3 # Number of digits when printing
  )

  #----------------- PROJECT INFO -----------------# 
info <- list(
  Title = "PREDICTIVE H",
  R_Version = R.version$version.string,
  Working_Directory = getwd(),
  Timestamp = format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))

separator <- strrep("=", 80)
cat("\n", separator, "\n", info$Title, "\n", separator, "\n")
cat("R Version:", info$R_Version, "\n")
cat("Working Directory:", info$Working_Directory, "\n")
cat("Timestamp:", info$Timestamp, "\n\n")

# show session info for reproducibility
# sessionInfo()
```


```{r INSTALL-LOAD-packages, message=FALSE}
#could have added message=false
  #----------------- LOAD REQ PACKAGES -----------------# 
cran_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "randomForest",
  "caret",
  "pROC",
  "readxl",
  "writexl",
  "rmarkdown",
  "ggplot2"
)
bioc_packages <- c(
  # placeholder
)

  #-----------------INSTALL CRAN PACKAGES -----------------# 
new_cran <- cran_packages[!(cran_packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"])]

if (length(new_cran) > 0) {
  install.packages(new_cran)
}

  #----------------- INSTALL BIOCONDUCTOR -----------------#
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}

new_bioc <- bioc_packages[!(bioc_packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"])]

if (length(new_bioc) > 0) {
  BiocManager::install(new_bioc, ask = FALSE)
}

  #----------------- LOAD PACKAGES -----------------#
invisible(lapply(cran_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

  #----------------- AFTER Installation You just need the following  -----------------#
#install.packages("renv")
#renv::init()
```


```{r setup-DIR}
  #-----------------SET OUTPUT DIRECTORY -----------------#
graphics_dir <- file.path("Results/Graphics")
tables_dir   <- file.path("Results/Tables") 
procdata_dir <- file.path("Results/Processed_data")

dirs <- c(graphics_dir, tables_dir, procdata_dir)

# Create directories if they don't exist
invisible(
  sapply(
    dirs,
    function(d) {
      if (!dir.exists(d)) {
        dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      }
    }
  )
)
## Print confirmation
cat("Directories ready:\n")
cat("- Graphics: ", graphics_dir, "\n")
cat("- Tables:   ", tables_dir, "\n")
cat("- Proc:     ", procdata_dir, "\n")
```


```{r}
  #----------------- FILE PATHS -----------------#
file_path <- "~/Desktop/Lab/TRAPseq/HvIM/Results/Tables/DESeq2_results.xlsx"
library(readxl)
sheets <- excel_sheets(file_path)
DESeq_res_list <- lapply(sheets, function(x) read_xlsx(file_path, sheet = x))
# name the list elements by sheet
names(DESeq_res_list) <- sheets

  #----------------- FORMAT FILES -----------------#
#Ensure gene IDs are consistent
res_H_UM <- DESeq_res_list$H_vs_UM_DEGs %>%
  rename(id = TAIR) %>%
  mutate(
    pvalue = signif(pvalue, 3),
    padj   = signif(padj, 3)
  )

res_IM_UM <- DESeq_res_list$IM_vs_UM_DEGs %>%
  rename(id = TAIR) %>%
  mutate(
    pvalue = signif(pvalue, 3),
    padj   = signif(padj, 3)
  )

#res_H_UM <- res_H_UM %>%
#  mutate(
#    pvalue = formatC(pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2),
#    padj   = formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2)
#  )

#res_IM_UM <- res_IM_UM %>%
#  mutate(
#    pvalue = formatC(pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2),
#    padj   = formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2)
#  )

  ######################### H GREEN GENES   ######################### 
#H_path <- "~/Desktop/Lab/TRAPseq/HvIM/Results/Tables/H_green_results.xlsx"
#sheets <- excel_sheets(H_path)
#print(sheets)
#H_res_list <- lapply(sheets, function(x) read_xlsx(H_path, sheet = x))

# name the list elements by sheet
#names(H_res_list) <- sheets
#green_H_up <- H_res_list$Green_H_UP
#green_H_down <- H_res_list$Green_H_DOWN
```


```{r}
  #----------------- MAIN FEATURES -----------------#
features <- res_H_UM %>%
  select(
    id,
    logFC_H_UM = log2FoldChange,
    padj_H_UM = padj,
    baseMean
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    res_IM_UM %>% select(id, logFC_IM_UM = log2FoldChange, padj_IM_UM = padj),
    by = "id"
  )
#H_genes <- union(green_H_up$id, green_H_down$id) %>% as.character()
# Create binary label
#features <- features %>%
#  mutate(
#    H_label = factor(ifelse(id %in% H_genes, 1, 0))
#  )

# Impute missing values in IM vs UM columns
features <- features %>%
  mutate(
    logFC_IM_UM = ifelse(is.na(logFC_IM_UM), 0, logFC_IM_UM),
    padj_IM_UM  = ifelse(is.na(padj_IM_UM), 0, padj_IM_UM),
    baseMean    = log10(baseMean + 1),
    padj_H_UM   = -log10(padj_H_UM + 1e-10),
    padj_IM_UM  = -log10(padj_IM_UM + 1e-10)
  )
```


```{r}
  #----------------- TRAIN TEST SPLIT -----------------#
set.seed(123)
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(features$H_label, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- features[trainIndex, ]
test_data  <- features[-trainIndex, ]

# Rename label for caret (SMOTE)
train_data$H_label <- factor(train_data$H_label, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("NonH","H"))
test_data$H_label  <- factor(test_data$H_label, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("NonH","H"))

table(train_data$H_label)
table(test_data$H_label)
```

```{r}
## 6. RANDOM FOREST WITH SMOTE
train_ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 3,
  sampling = "smote",       # Apply SMOTE to balance classes
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary
)

set.seed(123)
rf_smote <- train(
  H_label ~ logFC_H_UM + padj_H_UM + baseMean + logFC_IM_UM + padj_IM_UM,
  data = train_data,
  method = "rf",
  metric = "ROC",            # Optimize for AUC
  trControl = train_ctrl,
  ntree = 500,
  importance = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
## 7. EVALUATION
# Predictions
pred <- predict(rf_smote, test_data)
prob <- predict(rf_smote, test_data, type = "prob")[, "H"]

# Confusion matrix
confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$H_label)

# ROC / AUC
roc_obj <- roc(response = test_data$H_label, predictor = prob, levels = c("NonH","H"))
plot(roc_obj)
auc(roc_obj)

# Feature importance
varImp(rf_smote)
```

```{r}
## 8. EXPORT PREDICTIONS TO EXCEL

# Combine gene ID, true label, predicted label, and H probability
predictions_df <- test_data %>%
  select(id) %>%                       # keep gene IDs
  mutate(
    True_Label = test_data$H_label,
    Pred_Label = pred,
    H_Prob     = prob
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(H_Prob))                # optional: rank by probability

# Define output path
output_file <- file.path(tables_dir, "H_gene_predictions.xlsx")

# Export
writexl::write_xlsx(predictions_df, output_file)

cat("Predictions exported to:", output_file, "\n")
```

```{r}
## 9. TOP H GENE TABLE

# Set probability threshold for “high-confidence H genes”
prob_thresh <- 0.8

top_H_genes <- predictions_df %>%
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      Pred_Label == "H" & True_Label == "H"      ~ "True_Positive",
      Pred_Label == "H" & True_Label == "NonH"   ~ "False_Positive",
      Pred_Label == "NonH" & True_Label == "H"   ~ "False_Negative",
      TRUE                                        ~ "True_Negative"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Pred_Label == "H" | H_Prob >= prob_thresh) %>%   # keep predicted H or high-prob candidates
  arrange(desc(H_Prob))                                  # rank by probability

# Export top H genes
output_top_file <- file.path(tables_dir, "Top_H_gene_candidates.xlsx")
writexl::write_xlsx(top_H_genes, output_top_file)

cat("Top H gene candidates exported to:", output_top_file, "\n")
```



```{r}
#Add transporters annotation
transporter_list <- readxl::read_excel("../HvIM/Data_Repository/6_transporter_df.xlsx")
transporter_genes <- transporter_list %>%
  rename(id = TAIR)

features <- features %>%
  mutate(
    H_up_fourway   = as.integer(id %in% green_H_up$id),
    H_down_fourway = as.integer(id %in% green_H_down$id),
    H_fourway_status = case_when(
      id %in% green_H_up$id   ~ "H_up",
      id %in% green_H_down$id ~ "H_down",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    )
  )
# Combine H_up and H_down into a single set of H genes
H_genes <- union(green_H_up$id, green_H_down$id)
H_genes <- as.character(H_genes)  # Ensure consistent type
features <- features %>%
  mutate(
    H_label = as.factor(ifelse(id %in% H_genes, 1, 0))
  )
```


```{r}
# Define high-confidence seed genes
# Prepare modeling dataset
model_df <- features %>%
  select(
    H_label,
    logFC_H_UM,
    padj_H_UM,
    baseMean,
    logFC_IM_UM,
    padj_IM_UM
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    baseMean = log10(baseMean + 1),
    padj_H_UM = -log10(padj_H_UM + 1e-10),
    padj_IM_UM = -log10(padj_IM_UM + 1e-10),
    logFC_IM_UM = ifelse(is.na(logFC_IM_UM), 0, logFC_IM_UM),
    padj_IM_UM = ifelse(is.na(padj_IM_UM), 0, padj_IM_UM)
  )
```


```{r}
library(caret)
set.seed(123)

trainIndex <- createDataPartition(model_df$H_label, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- model_df[trainIndex, ]
test_data  <- model_df[-trainIndex, ]

# Check class counts
table(train_data$H_label)
table(test_data$H_label)

library(randomForest)

set.seed(123)

# Define sampsize: equal number of 0s and 1s in each tree
samp_sizes <- table(train_data$H_label)
min_class <- min(samp_sizes)  # smallest class count

rf_model <- randomForest(
  H_label ~ .,
  data = train_data,
  ntree = 500,
  importance = TRUE,
  sampsize = c(`0` = min_class, `1` = min_class)
)
# Save model
saveRDS(rf_model, "Results/Models/rf_H_model.rds")

# Load model later
rf_model <- readRDS("Results/Models/rf_H_model.rds")
# Evaluate
# Predictions
pred <- predict(rf_model, test_data)

# Confusion matrix
confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$H_label)

# ROC / AUC
library(pROC)
prob <- predict(rf_model, test_data, type = "prob")[,2]
roc_obj <- roc(test_data$H_label, prob)
plot(roc_obj)
auc(roc_obj)

# Feature importance
varImpPlot(rf_model)
```

```{r}
## 10. VISUALIZE MODEL PERFORMANCE

library(ggplot2)
library(pROC)

# Predicted probabilities for H class
prob_H <- predict(rf_smote, test_data, type = "prob")[, "H"]

# ROC curve
roc_obj <- roc(
  response = test_data$H_label,
  predictor = prob_H,
  levels = c("NonH","H")
)

# Plot ROC
roc_plot <- ggroc(roc_obj) +
  ggtitle(paste0("ROC Curve (AUC = ", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), ")")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate", y = "True Positive Rate")

print(roc_plot)

# Plot predicted probabilities for H vs NonH
prob_df <- test_data %>%
  mutate(H_prob = prob_H) %>%
  select(H_label, H_prob)

prob_plot <- ggplot(prob_df, aes(x = H_label, y = H_prob, fill = H_label)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("NonH" = "#1f77b4", "H" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  labs(title = "Predicted Probability Distribution for H Genes",
       x = "True Class",
       y = "Predicted Probability") +
  theme_minimal()

print(prob_plot)
```

```{r}
## 10. VISUALIZE MODEL PERFORMANCE

library(ggplot2)
library(pROC)

# Predicted probabilities for H class
prob_H <- predict(rf_smote, test_data, type = "prob")[, "H"]

# ROC curve
roc_obj <- roc(
  response = test_data$H_label,
  predictor = prob_H,
  levels = c("NonH","H")
)

# Plot ROC
roc_plot <- ggroc(roc_obj) +
  ggtitle(paste0("ROC Curve (AUC = ", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), ")")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate", y = "True Positive Rate")

print(roc_plot)

# Plot predicted probabilities for H vs NonH
prob_df <- test_data %>%
  mutate(H_prob = prob_H) %>%
  select(H_label, H_prob)

prob_plot <- ggplot(prob_df, aes(x = H_label, y = H_prob, fill = H_label)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("NonH" = "#1f77b4", "H" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  labs(title = "Predicted Probability Distribution for H Genes",
       x = "True Class",
       y = "Predicted Probability") +
  theme_minimal()

print(prob_plot)
```

```{r}
# Save model
saveRDS(rf_model, file.path(procdata_dir, "rf_H_model.rds"))
# Load model later
rf_model <- readRDS("Results/Models/rf_H_model.rds")
```
